notes: Per-site biomass_cci_v7 site classifications (all networks). Column 'biomass_bin': existing 7-bin hybrid (unchanged). Column 'biomass_bin_30': new 30-bin hybrid added. 30-bin scheme: bin 1 = < 5 Mg/ha; bins 2–30 = 29 equal-area quantile bins. 29 breakpoints (Mg/ha): 5.0, 7.0, 8.0, 10.0, 12.0, 13.0, 16.0, 18.0, 21.0, 24.0, 28.0, 32.0, 37.0, 42.0, 48.0, 55.0, 62.0, 70.0, 80.0, 90.0, 102.0, 115.0, 129.0, 146.0, 167.0, 196.0, 239.0, 278.0, 312.0.
